top_signals.title: Treasury yields rise ahead of key inflation data and traders weigh U.S.-Iran negotiations
top_signals.summary: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — rose over 3 basis points to 4.483%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Italy rejects aid scheme that buys US weapons for Ukraine’s defense
top_signals.summary: NATO has said the Prioritised Ukraine Requirements List (PURL) mechanism has helped fund the purchase of air-defense systems, in particular.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer Quits | The Pulse 6/22/2026
top_signals.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Gilles Moëc, Axa Chief Economist; John Aylward, Sona Asset Management Founder & CIO; Anand Menon, UK In A Changing Europe Director; Greg Fleming, Rockefeller Capital Management President & CEO (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The new arms race in wealth management: Winning the ultra-wealthy
top_signals.summary: Most registered investment advisors say they serve wealthy clients. The CNBC Elite Advisors list aims to help ultra-high net worth investors narrow the field.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
